title: EEG dataset on consumer responses to extreme versus traditional marketing videos
description: This dataset contains EEG recordings from ten participants viewing marketing video stimuli designed to compare consumer neural responses to traditional product-focused advertisements versus extreme documentary-style videos from three companies (Red Bull, GoPro, Columbia Sportswear). Data were acquired using a 14-channel EMOTIV EPOC X headset to investigate neuromarketing responses to different advertising approaches.
methods_description: EEG data were collected using a 14-channel EMOTIV EPOC X headset while participants viewed six marketing video stimuli from three companies, categorized as either traditional product-focused advertisements or extreme authentic documentary-style videos.
